messages.content: I'm having trouble focusing at work. The office is so noisy and distracting.
That sounds really challenging! Noise and distractions can definitely impact productivity. What kind of work environment do you think would help you focus better?
I used to work in a busy collaborative office, but I'm finding it harder to concentrate there now.
It sounds like your needs might be changing. Have you considered what specific aspects of your environment affect your concentration the most?
